entity.summary: Mexico-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Bitso brand.

events.title: Bitso launched in Mexico
events.description: Bitso launched in Mexico in April 2014 as a cryptocurrency exchange serving Latin American users.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker; the canonical entity retains year-level precision.

evidence.title: What is Bitso?
evidence.notes: Official help-center article states that Bitso emerged in 2014.

evidence.title: The Leading Cryptocurrency Platform In LATAM: 10 Years Of Bitso
evidence.notes: Official tenth-anniversary article places the project launch in April 2014.
